body:
## Summary
- Render generic handoff marker comments as compact status tables while preserving hidden markers.
- Derive review-to-fix-pr task context from synthesis action items and pass it through orchestrator/fix-pr workflows.
- Tighten orchestrator/fix-pr prompts and docs around fix-pr handoff context.

## Tests
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`
- `node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/handoff.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.js .agent/dist/__tests__/envelope.test.js`
- `git diff --check`

Closes #129

comments.body:
Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `implement` -> `review` (round 3/10).

agent planner selected review: Implementation succeeded and produced open PR #131 for issue #129; an automated review is the appropriate next step before merge.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777866348325 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyOTk3MTE5ODk6aW1wbGVtZW50OjEyOTpyZXZpZXc6MTMxOjM -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 98 | PASS | 8 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| communication / generic | Keep status comments compact | pass | 12/12 | Generic handoff comments now render a compact status table plus a focused `Task for fix-pr` block while preserving hidden markers in [`handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/src/handoff.ts#L354). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Prefer explicit structured inputs | pass | 12/12 | Adds a separate `source_handoff_context` workflow input and env plumbing instead of overloading source conclusion or request text in [`agent-orchestrator.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml#L39). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 11/12 | Moves the transposed table helper into shared handoff code and reuses it for generic handoff comments and existing sub-orchestration comments in [`handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/src/handoff.ts#L120). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 12/12 | Orchestrator docs now document source handoff context, fix-pr task context, compact handoff tables, and hidden marker behavior in [`agent-orchestrator.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/docs/technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md#L57). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Validate delegated route authorization | pass | 12/12 | The PR preserves requester/access-policy inputs through orchestrator dispatch and leaves preflight capability validation in place before downstream dispatch in [`agent-orchestrator.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml#L106) and [`orchestrate-handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts#L1095). |
| coding_workflow / specific | Default follow-up orchestration to one-shot | pass | 10/10 | Follow-up chaining remains gated to explicit orchestration context; direct runs still skip orchestrator dispatch when automation is disabled in [`dispatch-agent-orchestrator.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/src/cli/dispatch-agent-orchestrator.ts#L33). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make user-facing automation idempotent | pass | 12/12 | Existing marker dedupe is preserved while pending/dispatched/failed comments are updated through the same hidden marker flow in [`orchestrate-handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/2201c7c6dc49df3d5b7862cd61831e7f9e2d9f4d/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts#L1221). |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 17/18 | Changes are narrowly scoped to handoff formatting, context plumbing, prompts, docs, and focused tests; no unrelated workflow or route refactor is present. |

## Notes

- The strongest rubric fit is communication: the PR directly implements the requested compact table style and explicit fix-pr task context, with tests covering both formatter output and dispatch payload propagation.
- The structured input and authorization rubrics are satisfied because context is passed as its own workflow input while existing requester, association, access policy, and preflight checks remain intact.
- Smallest useful follow-up: none for the selected rubrics.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric-specific findings.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #131 closes #129, which asked for generic orchestrator handoff comments to use the compact tabular style used elsewhere.
- It also tries to make review-to-fix-pr handoffs more explicit by deriving task context from review synthesis action items and passing that context through orchestrator/fix-pr workflows.
- The implementation updates handoff formatting, workflow inputs, prompts, docs, and focused tests.
- Reviewers generally agree the visible comment format, docs, and rubric alignment are strong, but two context-propagation gaps remain.

## Review
The PR is close, but it has two unresolved behavior issues that can send fix-pr the wrong or missing task context. These are concrete branch changes and should be fixed before merge.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Agent planner cannot read source handoff context | BLOCKING | The workflow exports `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT`, but `run.ts` does not allowlist it for prompt rendering, so agent-mode planners see the prompt variable as blank. |
| Manual PR orchestrate can send the wrong fix-pr task | BLOCKING | The post-decision fallback applies review-synthesis-only instructions to manual PR `/orchestrate` starts with `CHANGES_REQUESTED`, where there may be no synthesis and fix-pr should inspect requested-change comments. |

## Progress
- The compact handoff table format and `Task for fix-pr` block are implemented and covered by tests.
- Docs and prompts were updated, and the rubric review passed with no rubric-specific findings.
- Existing inline review comments were empty before synthesis; inline comments were posted for both unresolved line-specific issues.
- Optional polish noted by reviewers, such as consolidating duplicated verdict sets or documenting level-2 heading assumptions, is not required for this pass.

## Issue Details

<details>
<summary>Agent planner cannot read source handoff context</summary>

**Cause:** `.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml` sets `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT`, and `.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md` references it, but `.agent/src/run.ts` omits it from `SUPPLEMENTAL_PROMPT_VAR_NAMES`.

**Candidate solutions:** Add `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT` to the runtime prompt variable allowlist and add a focused contract test that fails if the variable is not renderable in planner prompts.

**Comments:** Posted inline on `.github/prompts/agent-orchestrator.md` line 15.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Manual PR orchestrate can send the wrong fix-pr task</summary>

**Cause:** The fallback at `.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts` fills any missing fix-pr handoff context with `defaultFixPrHandoffContext()`, including manual PR `/orchestrate` starts with `CHANGES_REQUESTED`.

**Candidate solutions:** Scope the default review-synthesis context to review-originated handoffs, or use a manual-PR-specific context that tells fix-pr to address the latest unresolved requested-change review comments.

**Comments:** Claude considered the post-decision mutation acceptable as a short-term safety net, but Codex flagged the concrete manual PR behavior gap. This synthesis treats it as blocking because fix-pr prioritizes non-empty orchestrator context over review comments. Posted inline on `.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts` line 1137.

</details>

## Recommended Next Step
`FIX_PR`: the remaining issues are concrete, localized branch changes suitable for an automated fix-pr pass.

## Final Verdict
NEEDS_REWORK

## Action Items
- [ ] Add `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT` to the runtime prompt variable allowlist and cover it with a prompt-rendering contract test.
- [ ] Fix the manual PR `CHANGES_REQUESTED` path so fix-pr receives requested-change review context instead of review-synthesis-only default instructions.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `review` -> `fix-pr` (round 4/10).

agent planner selected fix-pr: Latest review synthesis verdict is NEEDS_REWORK with Recommended Next Step FIX_PR; two concrete localized branch fixes remain and round budget is available.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777866915771 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyOTk5OTAzMjk6cmV2aWV3OjEzMTpmaXhfcHI6MTMxOjQ -->

**Sepo pushed fixes for this PR.** Branch: `agent/implement-issue-129/codex-25299711989`. Requested by @sepo-agent.

- Added `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT` to the runtime prompt allowlist with a focused planner prompt contract test.
- Fixed manual PR `/orchestrate` + `CHANGES_REQUESTED` handoffs so `fix-pr` gets requested-change review-comment context instead of review-synthesis fallback text.
- Updated orchestrator docs and verified with `npm --prefix .agent run build`, targeted `node --test`, and `git diff --check`.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `fix-pr` -> `review` (round 5/10).

agent planner selected review: fix-pr succeeded after addressing the two blocking review synthesis findings; one validation review is warranted before stopping the chain.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777867265813 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUzMDAyMTQxNzY6Zml4X3ByOjEzMTpyZXZpZXc6MTMxOjU -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 8 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| communication / generic | Keep status comments compact | pass | 12/12 | Generic handoff comments now render a compact transposed status table and a focused `Task for fix-pr` block in `.agent/src/handoff.ts`, matching issue #129’s requested style. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Prefer explicit structured inputs | pass | 12/12 | The PR adds separate `source_handoff_context` workflow input/env plumbing in `.github/workflows/agent-orchestrator.yml` instead of overloading conclusion text or request text. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 12/12 | The transposed Markdown table helper is moved/reused through shared handoff code rather than duplicating the formatting approach only in workflow glue. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 12/12 | `.agent/docs/technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md` documents source handoff context, review-originated fix-pr context, manual PR requested-change context, compact comments, and hidden marker behavior. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Validate delegated route authorization | pass | 12/12 | The orchestrator workflow continues to carry `author_association`, `access_policy`, and `repository_private`; preflight authorization remains before planner/dispatch, while downstream route context is preserved. |
| coding_workflow / specific | Default follow-up orchestration to one-shot | pass | 10/10 | Direct non-orchestrated runs still skip handoff unless `orchestration_enabled` or automation mode allows chaining; the PR only improves explicitly orchestrated handoff context. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make user-facing automation idempotent | pass | 12/12 | Existing hidden `sepo-agent-handoff` marker, pending/dispatched/failed states, stale pending retry behavior, and older-comment minimization are preserved while the visible comment format changes. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 18/18 | Changes are scoped to orchestrator handoff formatting, context derivation/plumbing, prompts, docs, and focused tests; no unrelated route or workflow refactor is introduced. |

## Notes

- The current PR head includes fixes for the earlier review blockers: `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT` is allowlisted in `.agent/src/run.ts`, and manual PR `/orchestrate` with `CHANGES_REQUESTED` now receives requested-change review-comment context instead of review-synthesis fallback text.
- The strongest rubric drivers are compact user-facing status, explicit structured input, and docs/tests staying aligned with the new orchestration behavior.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric-specific findings.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #131 closes #129 by making generic orchestrator handoff comments more scannable with compact status tables.
- It also makes review-to-fix-pr follow-up task context explicit, deriving it from review synthesis action items where available.
- The PR updates shared handoff formatting, orchestrator/fix-pr workflow plumbing, prompts, docs, and focused tests.
- A prior review round found two blocking context-propagation gaps; the current PR head includes fixes for both.

## Review
The current synthesized judgment is that no unresolved actionable issues remain. Claude’s earlier warning was based on the pre-fix head and called out a bounded design cleanup, while Codex and the rubrics review evaluated the current head and found no required changes.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No unresolved actionable issues | INFO | Current-head reviews report that the previous blockers are fixed, docs/tests are aligned, and the implementation satisfies the selected rubrics. |

## Progress
- Earlier inline blockers were addressed: `ORCHESTRATOR_SOURCE_HANDOFF_CONTEXT` is now allowlisted for planner prompt rendering.
- Manual PR `/orchestrate` with `CHANGES_REQUESTED` now gets requested-change review-comment context instead of review-synthesis fallback text.
- Rubrics review passed at 100 with no rubric-specific findings.
- Codex verification reported build, targeted tests, and diff check passing on current head `96f2ca43025cbff7705a4d622d6978d9b2493798`.
- No new inline comments were posted because remaining notes are either already addressed or optional cleanup.

## Recommended Next Step
`NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION`: no unresolved required branch-change work remains for an automated fix-pr pass.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change action items remain.

title: Improve orchestrator handoff comments
